---
title: "Papers & Reports"
listing:
  contents: "."
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

<!-- Add one .qmd stub per paper/report in this directory, e.g.:

---
title: "A note on such-and-such"
description: "Short abstract or one-line summary."
date: 2026-05-01
---

[PDF](pdfs/my-paper.pdf)

and put the PDF itself in papers/pdfs/. -->
